title: Head, Compensation & Benefits (Total Rewards) - Financial Services
description:
About

We are partnering a well-established, regulated organisation on the appointment of Head of Compensation & Benefits, to lead its total rewards agenda at group level.

Reporting to the Group Head of Human Capital Management, this role owns the design and governance of compensation and benefits frameworks to support talent attraction, retention and performance across the organisation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the design, implementation and ongoing review of group-wide compensation frameworks, ensuring alignment with business strategy and market competitiveness
  • Drive annual salary review, bonus planning and performance calibration cycles, ensuring strong governance, fairness and compliance
  • Conduct job evaluation, market benchmarking and pay analysis to support informed reward decisions
  • Advise HR Business Partners and senior leaders on compensation structuring, internal equity and reward trade-offs
  • Oversee salary structures, incentive schemes and variable pay programmes
  • Partner HCM and Finance on annual manpower budgeting and headcount planning
  • Lead the design, review and administration of employee benefits, including insurer and vendor management
  • Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, internal policies and audit standards
  • Develop and maintain C&B policies and guidelines, and support matters relating to the Remuneration & Nomination Committee

Requirements

  • 7–10 years of relevant experience in compensation and benefits, ideally within financial services or a regulated environment
  • Strong grounding in job evaluation, market benchmarking and total rewards frameworks
  • Comfortable working with HRIS and compensation tools (e.g. SAP SuccessFactors, Excel, analytics platforms)
  • Strong analytical capability, with the ability to translate data into clear, executive-level insights
  • High levels of integrity, discretion and professionalism
  • Strategic, structured thinker able to operate independently in a fast-paced environment

postedCompany.description:
In today's rapidly changing business environment, organisations need internal core capabilities that can adapt to complex and ambiguous external conditions. RevUp Consulting is founded upon the conviction that the right talents are pivotal to these capabilities.


Our founders have a combined century of experience in the industry and are dedicated to finding, attracting, and nurturing the right people for your organisation. Our teams share this commitment that the right people can Rev Up your business engines. With a vast network of C-suite personnel and mid/senior-level executives across the industries and functions we specialise in, we can partner with you to provide bespoke talent solutions to improve your internal processes, transform your operating model, strengthen governance frameworks, build/transform technology platforms, or drive top-line growth.  


At RevUp Consulting, we take a personalised and consultative approach to your talent strategy. We listen carefully to your strategic objectives, organizational culture, and workforce requirements, enabling us to develop highly customised talent mapping, search and attraction, selection, and talent engagement offerings that specifically align with your goals. 


As a result, we go far beyond simply providing resumes. 

We even go beyond the outcomes usually pursued by a contingency search service – placement numbers – to achieve an outstanding talent retention rate such that they make a real difference to you.  Whether you are a start-up, a multinational seeking to establish your presence in new territory, or a company undergoing transformation, we have the expertise to help you succeed in the specialist domains of:  


1. Financial Services

2. Medical and Consumer

3. Corporate functions (HR, Finance & Accounting & Legal)


In an uncertain world, we strive to provide certainty in perhaps the most vital element of your business: the quality of the professionals who power it.
postedCompany.name: REVUP CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
